title: Dhamaal 4
synopsis: The Dhamaal boys are back and ready to chase the "Treasure of Life," facing crazy challenges along the way. What starts as a treasure hunt quickly turns into a rollercoaster of hilarious misadventures.

synopsis_lang.en: The Dhamaal boys are back and ready to chase the "Treasure of Life," facing crazy challenges along the way. What starts as a treasure hunt quickly turns into a rollercoaster of hilarious misadventures.
synopsis_lang.zh_hk: 達摩爾兄弟檔強勢回歸，準備追尋「生命之寶」，一路上面對瘋狂挑戰。這場尋寶之旅，很快就變成一連串爆笑不斷的荒謬大冒險。

cast: Ajay Devgn, Arshad Warsi, Riteish Deshmukh

cast_lang.en: Ajay Devgn, Arshad Warsi, Riteish Deshmukh
cast_lang.zh_hk: Ajay Devgn, Arshad Warsi, Riteish Deshmukh

subtitle: English
